message:
perf(sql): optimize aggregation with typed arrays and GPU acceleration

- Add extractNumericValues function for fast column extraction
- Use Float64Array for aggregation instead of row-by-row iteration
- Add async GPU-accelerated aggregation for large datasets (5000+ rows)
- Optimize hash join with pre-extracted keys and inline object merging
- Fix esbuild config to handle WGSL shader imports
- Add 10K row benchmark test

At 1K rows: LanceQL now beats DuckDB on aggregation (0.75x), JOIN (0.77x), and complex WHERE (0.80x)
